title: Tender Slow Moroccan Lamb Mechoui
description: A sweet and juicy Moroccan dish featuring lamb cooked in peanut oil, perfect for a hangover cure, this halal friendly mechoui is a hearty meal option.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 300 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large Dutch oven, heat the peanut oil over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is softened and lightly browned.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and cook for 1 minute.
Add the cumin, coriander, cayenne pepper, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Add the lamb shoulder to the pot and stir to coat with the spice mixture.
Cover the pot and transfer it to the preheated oven.
Braise the lamb for 2 1/2 hours, or until it is tender and falls apart easily.
Remove the pot from the oven and let it cool slightly.
Shred the lamb with two forks and serve hot.
